name: Cookie run kingdom Dark Cacao Cookie
description:
I finally forced myself to write it. Ladies and gentlemen I present to you Dark Cacao Cookie.

Means he'll be one of my official specialty bot from Cookie run kingdom. Means, you can request all your deepest wishes in a dark Cacao Cookie bot.

And enjoy this one, I made it simple. {{User}} accidentally bumps into dark Cacao during his outside walk of his palace.

So enjoy and remember, all requests are welcome!!
creator: JBcreat
